qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_objeto_reclamo as oi_objeto_reclamo, t0.c_objeto_reclamo as c_objeto_reclamo, t0.d_objeto_reclamo as d_objeto_reclamo, SEC.policy, t0.c_objeto_reclamo as CODE, t0.d_objeto_reclamo as TEXT FROM LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Objetos.OBJETO_RECLAMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_objeto_reclamo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_objeto_reclamo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_objeto_reclamo as oi_objeto_reclamo, SEC.policy FROM LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Objetos.OBJETO_RECLAMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_objeto_reclamo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_objeto_reclamo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Objetos.OBJETO_RECLAMO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Objetos.OBJETO_RECLAMO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS.oi_objeto_reclamo) as CNT from LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS.oi_objeto_reclamo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS.d_objeto_reclamo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS.c_objeto_reclamo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
